# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instances with application EBS volumes for quick deployment

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC for the EC2 instances

  SubnetId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id
    Description: Subnet for the EC2 instances

  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
      - t3.xlarge
      - m5.large
      - m5.xlarge
      - m5.2xlarge
    Description: EC2 instance type

  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
    Description: Optional EC2 Key Pair for SSH access

  AmiId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Image::Id
    Description: AMI ID for the EC2 instances

  InstanceCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 1
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 10
    Description: Number of EC2 instances to launch

  VolumeSizeGiB:
    Type: Number
    Default: 100
    MinValue: 8
    MaxValue: 16384
    Description: Size of the application data EBS volume in GiB

  VolumeType:
    Type: String
    Default: gp3
    AllowedValues:
      - gp3
      - gp2
      - io1
      - io2
      - st1
      - sc1
      - standard
    Description: EBS volume type

  RootVolumeSizeGiB:
    Type: Number
    Default: 20
    MinValue: 8
    MaxValue: 1024
    Description: Root volume size in GiB

Resources:
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: Security group for application EC2 instances
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0

  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref AmiId
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        KeyName: !Ref KeyName
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: !Ref RootVolumeSizeGiB
              VolumeType: gp3
              DeleteOnTermination: true
              Encrypted: false
          - DeviceName: /dev/sdh
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: !Ref VolumeSizeGiB
              VolumeType: !Ref VolumeType
              DeleteOnTermination: false
              Encrypted: false
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash -xe
            mkdir -p /data
            if [ -b /dev/sdh ]; then
              mkfs -t ext4 /dev/sdh || true
              mount /dev/sdh /data || true
              grep -q '/data' /etc/fstab || echo '/dev/sdh /data ext4 defaults,nofail 0 2' >> /etc/fstab
            fi
            chown -R ec2-user:ec2-user /data || true

  EC2InstanceGroup:
    Type: AWS::AutoScaling::AutoScalingGroup
    Properties:
      MinSize: !Ref InstanceCount
      MaxSize: !Ref InstanceCount
      DesiredCapacity: !Ref InstanceCount
      VPCZoneIdentifier:
        - !Ref SubnetId
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security group ID
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup

  LaunchTemplateId:
    Description: Launch template ID
    Value: !Ref LaunchTemplate

  AutoScalingGroupName:
    Description: Auto Scaling group name
    Value: !Ref EC2InstanceGroup
